titleStmt.title: SII 24.224: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 224. (A.R. No. 360 of 1953-54.) IV PRĀKĀRA, WALL BEHIND ĀCHCHĀVAYYAṈ SHRINE, EAST OF THE MĒṬṬAḺAGIYAŚIṄGAR SHRINE.

summary.p: Partly covered up by the flooring slabs and by the intercepting walls. Seems to give a list of the shareholders of the gift village Kōdaṇḍarāma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam among whom figure Irāyūr Śoṭṭai Ēkāyaṉap-Periyaperumāḷ, Śoṭṭai Śellappiḷḷai, Kandāḍai-Bhagavad-Rāmānuja-Bhaṭṭar, etc. Regarding the formation of Kōdaṇḍarāma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, see No 223 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ koyil Akaram kodaṇḍarāmaccaturvvedimaṅkalam kaiyyolaippaṭi pattā vatu paṅkuḷavaril nāyaṉār koda
ācūri Ammaṉ nambyār paṅku (1/2) 2 Ātaṉūr Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷ paṅku 1 2 Ātaṉūr Eṭuttakai Aḻakiyār nambyā
r paṅku 1 2 Irāyūṟ coṭṭai Ekāyaṉap periya perumāḷ paṅku 1 2 Irāyūṟ coṭṭaic cellappiḷḷai Upāddhyāyar paṅku 1 U
ṇṭi śrīkṛṣṇabhaṭṭar paṅku 1 2 Iruṅkaṇṭi pravarasenar paṅku 1 2 Iḻakkantiṟattu pperiyāḻ
vār vallabhar paṅku 1 2 kantāṭai śrīraṅganāthabhaṭṭar paṅku 1 2 kantāṭai śrīsaumitri dāsar paṅku 1 2 kantāṭait tiruvantiyūṟp perumāḷ paṅ
kāñcaip perumākkaḷ paṅku 1 kākkaṇṭur Eṭuttakai Aḻakiyār paṅku 1 2 kāṭṭuk kuṟi paṅku 1 2 kāṭṭukkuṟi śrikṛṣṇabhaṭṭar paṅku 1 2 manā

⎯⎯iraṇṭām variyil Iṭṭa cākkuvukku viḻunta Ātaṉūr ciraṅkanāthapaṭṭaṉ paṅku 1
⎯⎯mma paṅku 10 kantāṭai bhagavadrāmānujabhaṭṭar paṅku 15 2 Aṭṭāmpuṟattu Accutabhaṭṭa
⎯⎯ṅkap perumāḷ paṅku 1 2 Āttaṅkoṭipuṟattu Aḻakiyapātar paṅku 1 2 Ālikkoṉṟai śrīraṅgarājabha
⎯⎯pati nambyār paṅku 1 2 Irāyūṟ coṭṭait tevapperumāḷ paṅku 1 2 Irāyūṟ coṭṭai nārāyaṇa bhaṭṭar pa
⎯⎯ṅku 10 2 Udyatāci Āyānam paṅku 1 2 Uṟuppūṭṭur nārāyaṇa bhaṭṭar paṅku 1 2 Uṟu
⎯⎯rucai Eṭuttakai Aḻakiyār pa
⎯⎯picceṭṭu sarvvadevabhaṭṭar paṅku
⎯⎯�ṭurt tāmotarabhaṭṭar paṅku 1
⎯⎯1 2 kuḻal pocaṉ śrībharata
⎯⎯āḻvārupāddhyāyar paṅku (1/2) 2
⎯⎯ciṟumarutūr Aḻakiyar nambyā
⎯⎯ṭṭar paṅku tirumaṅkalattu Ā
⎯⎯mabhaṭṭar paṅku 1 2 noṭṭu
⎯⎯ Āḻvār paṅ
⎯⎯ttuk kaṭalaṭaitta perumā
⎯⎯koyil perumāḷāṉa

⎯⎯ṭām puṟattu Eccar paṅku Oṉṟu 2 Aṭṭāmpuṟattukka
⎯⎯1§ Āṉyūr Aruḷāḷar paṅku 1 2 Iṭaiyāṟṟukkuṭi Eṭut
⎯⎯aḻakiya pātar paṅku (1/2) 2 Iruṅkaṇṭi Āyar paṅku 1 2 Iruṅkaṇṭi Āḻva
⎯⎯ku 1 2 Uṟuppuṭṭur dāsarathi paṅku 1 2 Uṟuppuṭṭurt toḻappa nambyār pa

⎯⎯ṭṭām puṟattut tiruvaraṅkapperumāḷ paṅku Oṉṟu 2 Aṭṭāmpuṟattu brahmaccakravartti nam
⎯⎯2 Iṭaiyāṟṟukkuṭic cavaripperumāḷ paṅku 1 2 Irāyūrāṇṭāṉ bha
⎯⎯ṇṭi Irājanārāyaṇa cakravartti nambyār paṅku 1 2 Iruṅkaṇṭic cavarip perumāḷ paṅku
⎯⎯ḷai nambyār paṅku 12 jappakki govardhdhanabhaṭṭa Atirātrayājiyār paṅku 1 2 kaṇṭaṉ Āḻvā

⎯⎯ṉṟu 2 Araṇaippuṟattu praṇatārtthiharan paṅku Arai 2 Araṇaippuṟattu
⎯⎯irāyūr Ārāvamutu Upāddhyāyar paṅku 1 2 Irāyūrt tirukkopurat
⎯⎯śrīraṅganāthabhaṭṭar paṅku 1 2 Iruṅkaṇṭi Aḻakarāṉa śrīraṅganāthabhaṭṭar paṅku
⎯⎯ṭeṟṟu Ejñapuruṣan śrīvedavyāsabhaṭṭar paṅku 1 2 kaṇṭeṟṟu vakuḷābhara

⎯⎯ku Oṉṟu 2 Ākki śrīraṅgarāja bhaṭṭar paṅku 1 2 Ākki veda
⎯⎯paṅku (1/2) 2 Irāyūrc coṭṭai Āḻvār paṅku 1 2 Irāyūrc coṭṭai
⎯⎯ṇṭi śrīrāmadevar paṅku 1 2 Iruṅkaṇṭic ciṅkapperumāḷāṉa śrīrāma
⎯⎯kkaṉ paṅku 1 2 kantāṭai Eccar paṅku 1 2 kantāṭai Erittuṟai Āṇṭāṉ paṅ

⎯⎯aṭṭāmapuṟattu
⎯⎯ko ṟai śrīraṅganātha
⎯⎯pividyāsamudram paṅku 1 2 Iruṅku
⎯⎯r paṅku 2 Uṟuppaṭṭur
⎯⎯r paṅku 1
badly damaged
Digital edition of SII 24.224 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
